app.name: ClipSave
app.subtitle: Save public media you have rights to

home.inputPlaceholder: Paste Douyin/Xiaohongshu share link or text
home.complianceNotice: Only save content you own or are authorized to save
home.batchLimitExceeded: Maximum 20 links per batch. Only the first 20 will be processed.
home.emptyQueueHint: Paste a share link to start downloading

history.title: History
history.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, author, or URL
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoClipboardHint: Prompt to use clipboard content when window gains focus

about.title: About ClipSave
about.description: ClipSave is a cross-platform media save tool that helps users save public media content they have rights to.
about.disclaimerText1: ClipSave is not affiliated with Douyin, Xiaohongshu, or any third-party platform.
about.disclaimerText2: Users are responsible for ensuring their usage complies with applicable laws and platform terms.
about.disclaimerText3: This tool does not bypass access controls or copyright protection.
about.disclaimerText4: Only save content you own or are authorized to save.

errors.ParseFailed: Parse failed: Link not supported or platform page has changed
errors.UnsupportedPlatform: Unsupported platform: Currently only Douyin and Xiaohongshu are supported
errors.RestrictedContent: Cannot process: This content requires login or is not publicly accessible
errors.ContentNotFound: Content not found: The linked content has been deleted or does not exist
errors.NetworkError: Network error: Please check your connection and try again
errors.TimeoutError: Request timed out: Network is slow, please try again later
errors.PermissionDenied: Permission denied: Cannot access the specified directory
errors.DiskFullOrIoError: Storage error: Disk full or write failed
errors.InvalidInput: Invalid input: Please check your input
errors.TooManyRedirects: Too many redirects: Link may be invalid
errors.UnsafeRedirect: Unsafe redirect: Link points to an untrusted address
errors.InvalidTransition: Invalid operation: Current state does not allow this action

clipboard.prompt: Clipboard may contain a share link. Use it?
